sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79770" key="paro/rqios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρόρθιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n79770.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tolerably straight, not quite straight</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:146:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">146.7</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:154:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">154.4</biblScope> </bibl> :—also <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάρορθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:143:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">143.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
